STL Shelf
STL Shelf is a private 3D model library (digital asset manager) for 3D printing files.
A private system to organize STL files for makers and print teams.
STL file organizer for personal and team archives.
STL management software focused on clarity, retrieval speed, and ownership.
Build a 3D model library for 3D printing with tags + searchable library workflows.
Check files with in-browser 3D preview (interactive preview) before slicing.
Track revisions with version history and version control for iterations.
Deploy as cloud or self-hosted (Docker), with the same private-library model.

What STL Shelf is
- A private 3D model library for STL, 3MF, OBJ, and PLY files.
- A searchable workspace with tags, metadata, and practical organization.
- A browser-based 3D preview workflow for quick inspection.
- A versioned archive so each iteration stays traceable.
- A focused tool for reducing folder chaos in real 3D printing operations.

What STL Shelf is not
- Not a marketplace.
- Not a social feed.

Who this is for
- Makers with growing model collections.
- Print farms managing repeat jobs and revisions.
- Teams that need private ownership and reliable file history.
